# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

default:
  interruptible: true
  artifacts:
    expire_in: 30 days

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - printf '%s\n' '#!/usr/bin/env sh' 'echo "Running app binary: OK"' > dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - printf '%s\n' 'env=default' 'version=1.0.0' > dist/config/app.conf
    - printf '%s\n' "Built at: $(date -u +%FT%TZ)" > dist/BUILD_INFO.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/
    reports:
      dotenv: dist/build.env
  after_script:
    - printf 'BUILD_JOB_ID=%s\n' "${CI_JOB_ID}" > dist/build.env
    - printf 'BUILD_COMMIT_SHA=%s\n' "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> dist/build.env

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - test -x dist/bin/app
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat dist/config/app.conf
    - ./dist/bin/app

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:3.20
  when: manual
  allow_failure: false
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - test -x dist/bin/app
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat dist/config/app.conf
    - ./dist/bin/app
